name: LYMPH NODES OF THE NECK
definition: level VI node (not routinely excised during radical neck dissection)
discriminating_features: low to intermediate signal intensity on T1WI
intermediate to high signal intensity on T2WI
ovoid shape with echogenic fatty hilum

MR: low to intermediate signal intensity on T1WI
intermediate to high signal intensity on T2WI
US: ovoid shape with echogenic fatty hilum
greater enlargement + inflammation of surrounding tissue
normal to slightly enlarged in size
